## Source: amazon-inspector (cb7b29c037fd6e505ddbd1506f78292b2b69aef43c5750ef655bb27d5dd9986e)
The package @mesh-helpers/common was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (3c86cc06e9d97de0ef53ff01c2feee38bf1394e8a4db22e9ae19584fa8ad8f11)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@mesh-helpers/common' @ 99999.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
